content: The inbox is the mouth of the pipeline. One file per conversation/session (not per message) because the conversation is the atomic unit of truth. Raw capture must be lossless and immutable — done/ files are never modified, only derived artifacts change. The done/ move is the handoff signal to triage, not a 'finished' marker.

provenance.raw_agent: The inbox isn't a messaging utility — it's the mouth of the pipeline. One file per conversation/session (not per message) — because the conversation is the atomic unit of truth. Raw capture must be lossless and immutable.
provenance.raw_user: Conversations are the source of truth for intent. Everything else is derived.
provenance.what_was_ratified: Inbox as mouth of the pipeline; one file per session; lossless immutable capture; done/ as handoff to triage not a finished marker
